goal: Remove repeated absolute-heading correction from PS2 and ESP01S manual driving while preserving IMU yaw-rate straight-line assistance and closed-loop wheel speed control.
deliverable: Source-gated yaw-hold and straight-balance activation in lower-computer firmware.
acceptance: PC/navigation may use yaw hold by default.
PS2 and ESP01S do not use absolute yaw hold by default.
PS2 and ESP01S use gentle IMU-yaw-rate straight balance by default, with encoder fallback.
No PS2 protocol or ESP HTTP timing changes are included.
